Input Affixed

Text input with both prefix and suffix addons simultaneously using <lyte-input> Slyte DOM. Combines left-side and right-side elements for complete affixed input patterns.

Form Figma Synced 4 Variants × 6 States
Text + Text — Prefix and suffix text addons
URL domain
https:// .com
Currency + unit
$ USD
Phone with ext
+1 ext.
HTML
<!-- Text + Text: URL domain -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter domain" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Text + Text: Currency + unit -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">$</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Amount" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">USD</span>
</div>

<!-- Text + Text: Phone with extension -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">+1</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Phone number" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">ext.</span>
</div>
SCSS
/* Combo: both prefix + suffix classes on the affixed wrapper */
.zc-input-affixed.zc-input-prefixed.zc-input-suffixed {
  /* Inherits base .zc-input-affixed styles */
  /* Both .zc-input-prefix and .zc-input-suffix render */
}

.zc-input-affixed.zc-input-prefixed.zc-input-suffixed lyte-input {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.zc-input-prefix {
  padding: 0 12px;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F8F8F9);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
}

.zc-input-suffix {
  padding: 0 12px;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F8F8F9);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
}
Icon + Text — Icon prefix with text suffix
Email domain
@company.com
User handle
.io
Weight input
kg
HTML
<!-- Icon Prefix + Text Suffix: Email domain -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Email address" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">@company.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Icon Prefix + Text Suffix: User handle -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-at"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Username" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.io</span>
</div>

<!-- Icon Prefix + Text Suffix: Weight -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-weight-hanging"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter weight" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">kg</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-prefix-icon {
  padding: 0 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.zc-input-prefix-icon:hover {
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
}

.zc-input-suffix {
  padding: 0 12px;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F8F8F9);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
}
Icon + Icon — Icon prefix with icon suffix
Website URL
Search with filter
Location picker
HTML
<!-- Icon + Icon: Website URL -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Website" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i></span>
</div>

<!-- Icon + Icon: Search with filter -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Search..." class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-sliders-h"></i></span>
</div>

<!-- Icon + Icon: Location picker -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter location" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-crosshairs"></i></span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-prefix-icon {
  padding: 0 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.zc-input-suffix-icon {
  padding: 0 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.zc-input-prefix-icon:hover,
.zc-input-suffix-icon:hover {
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
}
Dropdown + Button — Dropdown prefix with button suffix
Phone + call
Protocol + go
Currency + convert
HTML
<!-- Dropdown Prefix + Button Suffix: Phone + Call -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select">
            <option>+1</option>
            <option>+44</option>
            <option>+91</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Phone number" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn">Call</button>
</div>

<!-- Dropdown Prefix + Button Suffix: Protocol + Go -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select">
            <option>https://</option>
            <option>http://</option>
            <option>ftp://</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Domain name" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn">Go</button>
</div>

<!-- Dropdown Prefix + Button Suffix: Currency + Convert -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select">
            <option>USD</option>
            <option>EUR</option>
            <option>GBP</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Amount" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn">Convert</button>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-prefix-dropdown {
  padding: 0;
}

.zc-input-prefix-select {
  height: 100%;
  padding: 0 8px 0 12px;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
  outline: none;
}

.zc-input-suffix-btn {
  padding: 0 16px;
  border: none;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-default, #0D4EF2);
  color: #FFFFFF;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background 0.15s ease;
}

.zc-input-suffix-btn:hover {
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-default-hover, #0B44D5);
}
States — Default, Focus, Filled, Error, Success
Default
https:// .com
Focus
https:// .com
Filled
https:// .com
Error
https:// .com
Success
https:// .com
HTML
<!-- Default -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Default state" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Focus -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-focus">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Focused input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Filled -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter domain" lt-prop-value="example" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Error -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-error">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Invalid domain" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Success -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-success">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Valid domain" lt-prop-value="mysite" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>
SCSS
/* Focus */
.zc-input-affixed-focus,
.zc-input-affixed:focus-within {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.05),
              0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.08);
}

/* Error */
.zc-input-affixed-error {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}

.zc-input-affixed-error .zc-input-prefix {
  border-right-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}

.zc-input-affixed-error .zc-input-suffix {
  border-left-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}

/* Success */
.zc-input-affixed-success {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}

.zc-input-affixed-success .zc-input-prefix {
  border-right-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}

.zc-input-affixed-success .zc-input-suffix {
  border-left-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Text + text disabled
https:// .com
Icon + icon disabled
Dropdown + button disabled
HTML
<!-- Disabled Text + Text -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Disabled Icon + Icon -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i></span>
</div>

<!-- Disabled Dropdown + Button -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select" disabled>
            <option>+1</option>
            <option>+44</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn" disabled>Call</button>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-affixed-disabled {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
  border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-prefix {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-suffix {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-prefix-select {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-suffix-btn {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
